_comment: Drop this file at <workspace>/.whisper-config.json. Both the file and DB skills read it. All keys are optional.
_self_mic_comment: Speaker names treated as the user's own local-mic track. Each segment whose speaker matches one of these is dropped during canonical building IF a non-self speaker has a near-duplicate segment (text similarity >= 0.7) within +/- 2.5 seconds. If a recording has ONLY self speakers (e.g. a solo voice memo), the dedup is skipped and all segments are kept.

6b8f97a8e5cd44238b61397a6c79c14e.note: left recording running through the rest of the workday; the actual meeting was 33 minutes

_truncate_comment: Per-recording manual truncation. Keys are either the MacWhisper session UUID (DB skill, 32 hex chars no dashes) OR the .whisper filename (file skill). Pick whichever maps unambiguously to the recording; the runner checks both. `after_ms` drops every segment that starts at or after this millisecond offset, then recomputes duration from the last surviving segment. Applied after self-mic dedup. The `note` field is just for your own reference.
